raw_proposals.note: Raw model extractions across all routed clinical reports.

literal_misses.note: Proposed spans not found literally in their clinical report.

fuzzy_recoveries.note: Literal misses recovered by approximate matching.

final_spans.note: Final gold spans across the complete synthetic cohort.

aurc.note: AURC; lower is better; true token log-probabilities.
